name: pnmc
body:
### Petri Net Model Checker
pnmc is a small model checker for Petri nets. It is build on top of the [libsdd](https://github.com/ahamez/libsdd/) C++ library, which implements Hierarchical Set Decision Diagrams.

Its main focus is efficient state space generation. As such, only dead states are computed. Reachability queries are planned.

### Authors and Contributors
Alexandre Hamez (@ahamez)
